dialogues.scene: Haneda arrivals, 3pm, thirteen hours of plane in your bones. The ticket counter first, then — somehow — a hotel front desk by nightfall. This is the run you rehearsed for.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.jp: こんにちは。どちらまで いきますか？
turns.romaji: konnichiwa. dochira made ikimasu ka?
turns.en: hello. where are you headed?

turns.speaker: you
turns.stakes: Two rucksacks, one destination. Ask for tickets to Tokyo.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.jp: とうきょうえきですね。きっぷは にまいですか？
turns.romaji: Tōkyō-eki desu ne. kippu wa nimai desu ka?
turns.en: Tokyo station, got it. two tickets?

turns.speaker: you
turns.stakes: Both of you, always. Confirm it.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.jp: ぜんぶで さんぜんえんに なります。
turns.romaji: zenbu de sanzen-en ni narimasu.
turns.en: that'll be 3,000 yen altogether.

turns.speaker: you
turns.stakes: You've no yen yet — the exchange desk had a queue. Ask if card is OK.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.jp: はい、だいじょうぶです。ホームは にばんせんです。
turns.romaji: hai, daijōbu desu. hōmu wa niban-sen desu.
turns.en: yes, that's fine. your platform is number two.

turns.speaker: you
turns.stakes: First transaction in Japan: survived. Thank her.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.jp: こんばんは。ホテルさくらへ ようこそ。
turns.romaji: konbanwa. hoteru Sakura e yōkoso.
turns.en: good evening. welcome to Hotel Sakura.

turns.speaker: you
turns.stakes: Two trains later, you made it. Tell him you have a reservation.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.jp: はい、ございます。おへやは ごかいです。かぎを どうぞ。
turns.romaji: hai, gozaimasu. o-heya wa gokai desu. kagi o dōzo.
turns.en: yes, here it is. your room is on the fifth floor — here's your key.

turns.speaker: you
turns.stakes: One thing left before you can tell everyone you landed. Ask for the wifi password.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.jp: こちらに かいて あります。ごゆっくり どうぞ。
turns.romaji: kochira ni kaite arimasu. go-yukkuri dōzo.
turns.en: it's written here. please rest well.

turns.speaker: you
turns.stakes: Day zero, complete. A light, tired thanks — then that bed.

dialogues.scene: A lantern-lit izakaya down a Shinjuku side street, 8pm, your first proper night out. No booking, one shellfish allergy between you, and the smell of the grill pulling you in.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.jp: いらっしゃいませ！ごよやくですか？
turns.romaji: irasshaimase! go-yoyaku desu ka?
turns.en: welcome! do you have a reservation?

turns.speaker: you
turns.stakes: You just followed the smell of the grill. Admit it — no booking.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.jp: なんめいさまですか？
turns.romaji: nanmei-sama desu ka?
turns.en: how many of you?

turns.speaker: you
turns.stakes: The eternal answer. Table for two.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.jp: カウンターせきなら ございます。どうぞ！
turns.romaji: kauntā-seki nara gozaimasu. dōzo!
turns.en: we have counter seats. this way!

turns.speaker: you
turns.stakes: Seated at the counter, chef in view. Ask for the menu.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.jp: はい、どうぞ。おのみものは なにに しますか？
turns.romaji: hai, dōzo. o-nomimono wa nani ni shimasu ka?
turns.en: here you are. what will you have to drink?

turns.speaker: you
turns.stakes: You've waited nine weeks and one long flight for this. Two beers.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.jp: はい！きょうは かにが おすすめですよ。
turns.romaji: hai! kyō wa kani ga osusume desu yo.
turns.en: coming up! today the crab is excellent, by the way.

turns.speaker: you
turns.stakes: The allergy. One of you can't eat shellfish — say it clearly before anything's ordered.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.jp: しょうちしました。では、とりにくの くしは いかがですか？
turns.romaji: shōchi shimashita. dewa, toriniku no kushi wa ikaga desu ka?
turns.en: understood. how about chicken skewers instead?

turns.speaker: you
turns.stakes: Perfect and safe. Order two of those.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.jp: はい、なまビール おまたせしました！
turns.romaji: hai, nama-bīru o-matase shimashita!
turns.en: here we are — two draught beers, sorry for the wait!

turns.speaker: you
turns.stakes: Cold glasses, warm room, the whole trip ahead. You know the word.

dialogues.scene: Shinjuku station, 9:50am, day-trip day. Somewhere beyond the crowds is a train to the mountains — and you'd both quite like to be on it.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.jp: おはようございます。どうしましたか？
turns.romaji: ohayō gozaimasu. dō shimashita ka?
turns.en: good morning. can I help?

turns.speaker: you
turns.stakes: The board says Hakone but not where from. Ask which platform.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.jp: はこねゆきですね。ごばんせんです。つぎは じゅうじはんです。
turns.romaji: Hakone-yuki desu ne. goban-sen desu. tsugi wa jū-ji han desu.
turns.en: for Hakone? platform five. the next one is at half ten.

turns.speaker: you
turns.stakes: Neither of you has checked a clock since breakfast. Ask the time.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.jp: いま くじごじゅっぷんです。じかんは じゅうぶん ありますよ。
turns.romaji: ima ku-ji gojuppun desu. jikan wa jūbun arimasu yo.
turns.en: it's nine fifty. you've plenty of time.

turns.speaker: you
turns.stakes: Relief. Now the tickets — ask for two.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.jp: かたみちですか、おうふくですか？
turns.romaji: katamichi desu ka, ōfuku desu ka?
turns.en: one-way or return?

turns.speaker: you
turns.stakes: You're due back for dinner in the city. Return, please.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.jp: おうふく にまいで よんせんえんです。ごばんせんへ どうぞ。
turns.romaji: ōfuku nimai de yonsen-en desu. goban-sen e dōzo.
turns.en: two returns, 4,000 yen. platform five is that way.

turns.speaker: you
turns.stakes: One more thing before the mountains: ask where it is — the lake bus stop at the other end. (Drop your place into the slot.)

turns.speaker: npc
turns.jp: はこねえきの まえですよ。みぎに まがって ください。
turns.romaji: Hakone-eki no mae desu yo. migi ni magatte kudasai.
turns.en: right outside Hakone station. turn right as you come out.

turns.speaker: you
turns.stakes: Platform five, half ten, right out of the station. Show her it's all landed.

dialogues.scene: A blazing-bright Don Quijote, three floors of everything, two days before you fly home. There are people back in Scotland who expect treasure — and it's started raining outside.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.jp: いらっしゃいませ！なにか おさがしですか？
turns.romaji: irasshaimase! nanika o-sagashi desu ka?
turns.en: welcome! looking for anything in particular?

turns.speaker: you
turns.stakes: Half of Scotland wants a present. Tell her you're souvenir-hunting.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.jp: おみやげなら こちらが にんきですよ。
turns.romaji: omiyage nara kochira ga ninki desu yo.
turns.en: for souvenirs, these are the popular ones.

turns.speaker: you
turns.stakes: A beautiful box of matcha biscuits with no visible price. Ask how much.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.jp: にせんごひゃくえんです。
turns.romaji: nisen gohyaku-en desu.

turns.speaker: you
turns.stakes: Your basket has crossed the tax-free threshold. Ask if you can get it.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.jp: はい、できます。パスポートを おねがいします。
turns.romaji: hai, dekimasu. pasupōto o onegaishimasu.
turns.en: yes, you can. your passport, please.

turns.speaker: you
turns.stakes: Passport at the ready, like a seasoned traveller. Hand it over with the right word.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.jp: ありがとうございます。おしはらいは どう なさいますか？
turns.romaji: arigatō gozaimasu. o-shiharai wa dō nasaimasu ka?
turns.en: thank you. and how will you pay?

turns.speaker: you
turns.stakes: The card's been sulking since this morning. Cash it is.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.jp: レシートと おつりです。トレーから どうぞ。
turns.romaji: reshīto to otsuri desu. torē kara dōzo.
turns.en: your receipt and change — on the tray there.

turns.speaker: you
turns.stakes: Rain outside, fragile gifts inside. Ask for a bag.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.jp: はい、どうぞ。ありがとうございました！
turns.romaji: hai, dōzo. arigatō gozaimashita!
turns.en: of course, here you are. thank you very much!

turns.speaker: you
turns.stakes: Mission accomplished, presents secured. A light thanks on the way out.

dialogues.scene: A drugstore under the station lights, 7pm. Last night's street food has picked a fight with your partner's stomach, and you're the one who has to do the talking.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.jp: こんばんは。どうしましたか？
turns.romaji: konbanwa. dō shimashita ka?
turns.en: good evening. what's the trouble?

turns.speaker: you
turns.stakes: Your partner's gone grey by the door. Explain — feeling unwell.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.jp: それは いけませんね。ねつは ありますか？
turns.romaji: sore wa ikemasen ne. netsu wa arimasu ka?
turns.en: oh dear. is there a fever?

turns.speaker: you
turns.stakes: You checked their forehead twice on the walk here. No fever.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.jp: どこか いたい ところは ありますか？
turns.romaji: dokoka itai tokoro wa arimasu ka?
turns.en: any pain anywhere?

turns.speaker: you
turns.stakes: Say it for them — it's the stomach.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.jp: では、この くすりが いいですよ。しょくごに ひとつ です。
turns.romaji: dewa, kono kusuri ga ii desu yo. shokugo ni hitotsu desu.
turns.en: then this medicine is good. one tablet after meals.

turns.speaker: you
turns.stakes: Dosage is not the thing to guess at. Ask her to say it once more.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.jp: しょくごに、ひとつ、です。みずで のんで ください。
turns.romaji: shokugo ni, hitotsu, desu. mizu de nonde kudasai.
turns.en: after meals — one tablet. take it with water.

turns.speaker: you
turns.stakes: One after meals, with water. Confirm you've got it.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.jp: おだいじに。
turns.romaji: o-daiji ni.
turns.en: get well soon.

turns.speaker: you
turns.stakes: She's just rescued your evening. Thank her properly, and go play nurse.

dialogues.scene: The ryokan entrance, last morning, bags by the door. The okami who has fed you, fixed your yukata, and laughed at your Japanese all week comes to see you off.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.jp: おはようございます。きょうは ごしゅっぱつですね。
turns.romaji: ohayō gozaimasu. kyō wa go-shuppatsu desu ne.
turns.en: good morning. so today you set off.

turns.speaker: you
turns.stakes: The bags are packed, the trip is ending. Tell her — check-out.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.jp: かしこまりました。ごりょこうは いかがでしたか？
turns.romaji: kashikomarimashita. go-ryokō wa ikaga deshita ka?
turns.en: of course. and how was your trip?

turns.speaker: you
turns.stakes: Nine weeks of study, two weeks of magic. Give the trip the word it deserves.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.jp: うれしいです。けさの あさごはんは いかがでしたか？
turns.romaji: ureshii desu. kesa no asagohan wa ikaga deshita ka?
turns.en: I'm so glad. and this morning's breakfast?

turns.speaker: you
turns.stakes: Grilled fish, miso, that perfect rice. Past tense, from the heart.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.jp: おふたりに あえて、ほんとうに よかったです。
turns.romaji: o-futari ni aete, hontō ni yokatta desu.
turns.en: it has been a true pleasure to meet you both.

turns.speaker: you
turns.stakes: The phrase you saved for this exact doorway. Thank her for looking after you.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.jp: いえいえ、こちらこそ。えきまで タクシーを よびましょうか？
turns.romaji: ie ie, kochira koso. eki made takushī o yobimashō ka?
turns.en: not at all — the pleasure was ours. shall I call you a taxi to the station?

turns.speaker: you
turns.stakes: The bags are heavy and the train won't wait. Accept gratefully.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.jp: スコットランドまで、どうぞ おきをつけて。
turns.romaji: Sukottorando made, dōzo o-ki o tsukete.
turns.en: safe travels, all the way to Scotland.

turns.speaker: you
turns.stakes: You both already know it's true. Promise her you'll come back.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.jp: おまちして おります。いってらっしゃい！
turns.romaji: o-machi shite orimasu. itterasshai!
turns.en: we'll be waiting. off you go!

turns.speaker: you
turns.stakes: The taxi door is open. Say the goodbye you've kept for the very end.
